narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Demand for AI chips and related infrastructure continues to drive strong growth for semiconductor companies and specialized cloud providers, despite concerns about power and credit.
watchFor: Hyperscaler capex cuts at next earnings
NVIDIA revenue growth slows below 10%
Major power grid failures impacting data centers

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: The massive market potential of GLP-1 agonists for obesity and related conditions continues to fuel growth and investment in pharmaceutical companies leading this space.
watchFor: New, more effective weight-loss treatments emerge from competitors
Significant safety concerns or unexpected side effects for GLP-1 drugs
Payers impose severe restrictions on GLP-1 coverage

narratives.name: AI Software & Cloud Adoption
narratives.thesis: Enterprises are increasingly adopting AI-powered software and cloud solutions, driving revenue growth for companies providing these services and platforms.
watchFor: Major cloud providers report decelerating growth in AI-related services
Enterprise IT spending surveys show a pullback in AI initiatives
Increased regulatory scrutiny on AI software deployment

narratives.name: Credit Services Strength
narratives.thesis: Strong consumer spending and robust payment volumes continue to benefit credit card companies and payment processors.
watchFor: Consumer spending data shows a sharp contraction
Unemployment rate rises significantly, impacting credit quality
Increased regulatory caps on interchange fees

narratives.name: Digital Ad & Content Dominance
narratives.thesis: Large internet platforms continue to dominate digital advertising and content consumption, benefiting from strong user engagement and ad spend.
watchFor: Major platforms report declining active user bases
Significant shift in advertising budgets away from digital channels
New regulations severely impacting data collection for targeted ads

narratives.name: Aerospace & Defense Spending
narratives.thesis: Ongoing geopolitical tensions and global instability are driving increased defense budgets and orders for aerospace and defense contractors.
watchFor: Major defense budget cuts announced by key nations
Significant diplomatic breakthroughs reducing global tensions
Large-scale cancellations of defense contracts

narratives.name: Semiconductor Equipment Expansion
narratives.thesis: The ongoing buildout of semiconductor manufacturing capacity, particularly for advanced nodes, is fueling demand for semiconductor equipment and materials.
watchFor: Major chipmakers announce delays or cancellations of new fab projects
Geopolitical tensions escalate leading to restrictions on equipment sales
Global semiconductor sales data shows significant contraction

narratives.name: Entertainment Content Consumption
narratives.thesis: Demand for diverse entertainment content, including streaming and theme parks, remains robust as consumers prioritize experiences and digital media.
watchFor: Major streaming services report significant subscriber churn
Theme park attendance drops sharply due to economic slowdown
Increased competition leading to price wars in streaming

narratives.name: Discount Stores Stability
narratives.thesis: Consumers are increasingly prioritizing value, driving consistent traffic and sales at discount and warehouse retailers.
watchFor: Core CPI drops below 2% YoY for two consecutive months
Major discount retailers report significant margin compression
Shift in consumer spending away from staples towards discretionary

narratives.name: E-commerce Resilience
narratives.thesis: Despite inflationary pressures, online retail continues to show resilience, with consumers maintaining digital spending habits.
watchFor: Major e-commerce players report decelerating revenue growth
Significant increase in online return rates
Consumer spending shifts dramatically back to brick-and-mortar

narratives.name: Healthcare Plans Stability
narratives.thesis: Managed care organizations demonstrate stability, benefiting from consistent enrollment and effective cost management strategies.
watchFor: Unexpected increase in medical loss ratios for major plans
Significant changes in government healthcare policy (e.g., Medicare Advantage)
Rising unemployment leading to a drop in employer-sponsored coverage

narratives.name: Utilities - Independent Power Producers Growth
narratives.thesis: Independent power producers, especially those focused on conventional generation, are benefiting from the immediate demand for stable power to support industrial growth and new data centers, despite the long-term shift to renewables.
watchFor: Significant new renewable capacity comes online faster than expected
Industrial power demand unexpectedly declines
Regulatory shifts favor utility-owned generation over IPPs

narratives.name: Banks - Diversified AI Adoption
narratives.thesis: Diversified banks are increasingly adopting AI to improve operational efficiency and customer service, driving long-term competitive advantages.
watchFor: Major banks report significant cost overruns or failures in AI implementation
Regulatory bodies impose strict limitations on AI use in banking
Cybersecurity breaches linked to AI systems in financial institutions

narratives.name: Gold Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Gold's appeal as an inflation hedge and safe haven is balanced by a hawkish Federal Reserve and rising bond yields, creating a mixed outlook.
watchFor: 10Y real yield breaks below 1%
DXY drops significantly below 99
Geopolitical tensions escalate further

narratives.name: Logistics Operational Headwinds
narratives.thesis: Rising fuel costs and labor expenses, coupled with potential softening in global trade, create operational challenges for logistics companies.
watchFor: Crude oil prices drop significantly below $70/barrel
Global trade volumes show unexpected rebound
Major labor agreements result in lower-than-expected wage increases

narratives.name: Silver Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Silver, benefiting from both safe-haven demand and industrial applications, faces similar crosscurrents to gold but with added sensitivity to global manufacturing activity.
watchFor: Global manufacturing PMI shows strong expansion
Gold prices break out to new all-time highs
Significant decline in industrial demand for silver

narratives.name: Residential Construction Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Rising interest rates and high inflation are putting pressure on the housing market, creating uncertainty for homebuilders.
watchFor: 30-year fixed mortgage rates break above 8%
Existing home sales decline by >10% QoQ
Major homebuilders report significant order cancellations

narratives.name: Apparel Retail Headwinds
narratives.thesis: Apparel retailers face challenges from shifting consumer preferences, promotional environments, and potential softening of discretionary spending.
watchFor: Major apparel brands report significant inventory build-up
Consumer discretionary spending data shows a sharp decline in clothing purchases
Increased promotional activity across the sector impacting margins

narratives.name: Medical Devices Under Pressure
narratives.thesis: Medical device companies face headwinds from hospital budget constraints, supply chain issues, and increased regulatory scrutiny.
watchFor: Hospitals report significant easing of budget constraints
Supply chain disruptions for medical devices fully resolve
Regulatory approvals for new devices accelerate

narratives.name: Capital Markets Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Uncertainty around interest rates and economic growth is creating volatility in capital markets, impacting trading volumes and investment banking activity.
watchFor: Equity market volatility (VIX) drops significantly and stays low
Clear signals from the Fed on future rate path
Significant increase in IPO and M&A activity

narratives.name: Farm & Heavy Construction Machinery Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Demand for heavy machinery is sensitive to economic cycles and commodity prices, with current inflationary pressures and high interest rates posing potential risks.
watchFor: Global commodity prices experience a sustained downturn
Infrastructure spending initiatives are significantly delayed or cut
Agricultural income forecasts are revised sharply lower

narratives.name: Utilities - Renewable Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Despite long-term tailwinds from decarbonization, renewable energy projects face challenges from higher interest rates impacting project financing and grid integration issues.
watchFor: Interest rates decline significantly, reducing cost of capital for projects
Breakthroughs in energy storage technology improve grid stability
New government incentives or subsidies for renewable energy deployment

narratives.name: Other Industrial Metals & Mining Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Demand for industrial metals and rare earth elements is driven by infrastructure spending and technological advancements, but economic slowdowns could temper growth.
watchFor: Global industrial production declines sharply
Major new mining projects come online, increasing supply
Geopolitical tensions disrupt supply chains for critical minerals

narratives.name: Software Infrastructure Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Software Infrastructure on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Software Applications Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Software Applications on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Semiconductors Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Semiconductors on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Communication Equipment Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Communication Equipment on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Computer Hardware Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Computer Hardware on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Information Technology Services Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Information Technology Services on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Restaurants Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Restaurants on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Auto Manufacturers Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Auto Manufacturers on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Aerospace & Defense Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Aerospace & Defense on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Asset Management Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Asset Management on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Household & Personal Products Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Household & Personal Products on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

Technology.thesis: The AI capex cycle continues to be the dominant driver, with hyperscalers and chipmakers investing heavily. While there are concerns about power grid capacity and credit, demand for AI infrastructure remains robust.
watchFor: Mag 7 hyperscaler capex guide DOWN at next earnings — would crack the AI demand thesis
Significant slowdown in enterprise AI software adoption rates
Expansion of China export controls to advanced AI chips or equipment

Consumer Cyclical.thesis: Consumer discretionary spending remains resilient in certain areas like e-commerce, but rising inflation and interest rates are creating headwinds for big-ticket items like housing and potentially impacting broader retail.
watchFor: Core CPI print > 0.4% MoM for two consecutive months — signals persistent inflation hurting discretionary income
Retail sales data shows broad-based decline
Consumer confidence index drops significantly

Communication Services.thesis: Digital content consumption and advertising revenue remain strong, driven by continued engagement on major platforms and streaming services.
watchFor: Major digital advertising platforms report significant slowdown in ad spend
Subscription streaming services report net subscriber losses for two consecutive quarters
Increased regulatory pressure on content platforms impacting user engagement

Industrials.thesis: Defense spending remains a tailwind due to geopolitical tensions, but broader industrial demand faces uncertainty from inflation and potential economic slowdowns.
watchFor: Significant de-escalation of global geopolitical conflicts
Manufacturing PMI drops below 45 for two consecutive months
Major industrial companies report declining order backlogs

Healthcare.thesis: The GLP-1 drug wave continues to drive significant interest and investment, but other areas of healthcare face ongoing cost pressures and regulatory scrutiny.
watchFor: Unexpected negative clinical trial results for GLP-1 drugs
Major policy changes impacting drug pricing or PBM negotiations
Healthcare utilization rates decline significantly across the board

Financials.thesis: While credit services remain strong, the broader banking sector faces challenges from a hawkish Fed stance, potentially impacting loan growth and asset quality, alongside regulatory changes.
watchFor: Fed signals a clear pivot to rate cuts — would ease pressure on bond portfolios
Significant increase in loan delinquencies across major banks
New, restrictive financial regulations from the SEC or Federal Reserve

Consumer Defensive.thesis: Discount retailers continue to benefit from consumers seeking value amidst inflationary pressures, providing a defensive play in a volatile market.
watchFor: Inflation cools significantly, reducing demand for discount options
Major discount retailers report declining same-store sales
Consumer confidence shifts dramatically towards premium brands

Utilities.thesis: The long-term transition to renewables continues, but the immediate power grid capacity crunch, particularly for AI data centers, presents both opportunities and challenges for utilities.
watchFor: Government announces major new grid infrastructure projects with accelerated timelines
Hyperscalers significantly reduce their power demand forecasts
Interest rates rise sharply, increasing financing costs for large utility projects

Basic Materials.thesis: Demand for industrial metals and rare earths remains supported by strategic initiatives and technological advancements, but global economic uncertainty poses a risk.
watchFor: Global manufacturing PMI drops below 40
Significant oversupply in key industrial metals markets
Escalation of trade wars impacting raw material flows

Precious Metals.thesis: Precious metals are caught between inflation concerns (supportive) and a hawkish Fed / rising bond yields (headwind), with geopolitical risk providing some underlying bid.
watchFor: Fed signals clear dovish pivot, leading to sustained real yield declines
DXY breaks below 95 and stays there
Significant de-escalation of all major geopolitical conflicts
